name: PACCAR
analysis: PCAR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry $119.2250, stop $108.7218, target $150.7346 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
